TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Taipei, title = Taipei, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Taipei} }

S.FORM: Taipei hya' ga cyux maki' Tay 25N, 121E na Taywan. spzyang galang na Kokka' hya' ga Taipei.
Taipei hya' ga cyux maki' Tay 25N, 121E na Taywan. spzyang galang na Kokka' hya' ga Taipei.
S.PHON: taipei ħjaʔ ɣa ʦ~ʨjux makiʔ taj **n, ***e na tajwan. s~ɕpzjaŋ ɣalaŋ na kokkaʔ ħjaʔ ɣa taipei.
